posts.author: SarahJ_84
posts.text: Does anyone know if 'Hopeful Hearts Charity' is legitimate? I saw a post on WhatsApp asking for donations to help rebuild homes after the floods, but they didn't have a website link and asked me to send money directly to a personal bank account. It feels a bit suspicious as most charities use their official portals. #CharityCheck
posts.explanation: This post describes a potential impersonation of a charity that requires specialist investigation to verify authenticity.
